metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4942
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 3: immunogold EM shows GluN3A (GRIN3A) is localized to postsynaptic density membranes in the basolateral amygdala. Quantification of the observed subcellular distribution showed 40% of particles was found at the PSD, 54% at non-synaptic plasma membranes and 6% at non-synaptic intracellular sites.. Experimental description: M&M:
"Immunoelectron microscopy
Immunohistochemical reactions were carried out using the post-embedding immunogold technique. Briefly, ultrathin sections 80 nm thick from Lowicryl-embedded blocks of BLA from P21-P30 mice were ..."

anti-GluN3A antibody (Pr. Masahiko Watanabe). The specificity of the anti-GluN3A antibody was previously assessed by the absence of signal in samples from GluN3A KO mice (Marco et al., 2013; Otsu et al., 2019).
